task.title: Connect to Company Services and Install Approved Apps
task.shortdesc: Use these steps to connect to the secure company Wi-Fi network, verify Microsoft 365 access, and install approved apps from Self Service.

context.p: After initial setup is complete, you may need to connect to additional company services and verify access to required applications.

step.cmd: Connect to the secure company Wi-Fi network if you are in a company office or your organization requires it.

substep.cmd: Select the Wi-Fi icon in the menu bar.
Choose the approved secure company wireless network.
Confirm that the Wi-Fi icon shows an active connection.

step.cmd: Verify access to Microsoft 365 and Office applications.

substep.cmd: Open an application such as Outlook or Word.
Sign in with your company account if prompted.
Confirm that the application opens and your account is recognized.

step.info: If setting up Outlook, make sure Zscaler is connected first if required by your organization.

step.cmd: Open Self Service and install approved apps if needed.

example.title: Examples of apps that may be available in Self Service

result.p: You have verified access to company services and can install approved applications as needed.
